last_action: Implemented Move-out Request bug fix, Direct LINE messaging, Registration Flow refactor with National ID and Encryption.
summary: Phase 11: Security & Process Refinement. Fixed a critical NOT NULL constraint error in move-out requests by adding recovery logic from active leases. Implemented a direct LINE messaging feature from the owner dashboard to individual tenants. Significantly refactored the registration flow: added mandatory National ID (citizen_id) with transparent database encryption, implemented data auto-fill for returning tenants, and shifted room assignment control from tenants to admins during the approval process. Resolved circular dependencies in the security module to support clean model-level encryption.
next_steps: Verify encryption/decryption performance with a larger dataset.
User Acceptance Testing (UAT) for the new admin-led room assignment flow.
Update project documentation to reflect the new registration and messaging features.
